text: How good and pleasant it is when God's people live together in unity!
A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for a time of adversity.
Perfume and incense bring joy to the heart, and the pleasantness of a friend springs from their heartfelt advice.
Two are better than one, because they have a good return for their labor. If either of them falls down, one can help the other up.
My command is this: Love each other as I have loved you.

Make my joy complete by being like-minded, having the same love, being one in spirit and of one mind. In humility value others above yourselves, not looking to your own interests but each of you to the interests of the others.
Therefore encourage one another and build each other up
Bear with each other and forgive one another if any of you has a grievance against someone. Forgive as the Lord forgave you
Anyone who withholds kindness from a friend forsakes the fear of the Almighty
Perfume and incense bring joy to the heart, and the pleasantness of a friend springs from their heartfelt advice.

Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over a multitude of sins. Offer hospitality to one another without gumbling. Each of you should use whatever gift you have received to serve others, as faithful stewards of God's grace in its various forms.
Do not withold good from those to whom it is deu, when it is in your power to act.
